title: How to find out Success Rate and it's Visualisation
excerpt: I have two columns in my board now. Owner and Success. In owners, there are different employees, the type is people. In Success, there are Won, Lost, New and Submitted, they type is formula. This is a column indicating t…

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml: I have two columns in my board now. Owner and Success. In owners, there are different employees, the type is people. In Success, there are Won, Lost, New and Submitted, they type is formula. This is a column indicating the proposals of employees whether the proposals have been approved. I want to measure the success rate of the employees. The formula is "count of won / count of (Won + Lost + Submitted). Then I want to visualise the result showing the success rate of my employee. Guys, I’m having trouble on calculation the success rate. Is there any help I could get?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Alammulia1 ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I would suggest trying your hand at creating a chart widget.

There you can filter per person and see their % of won, lost and submitted proposals. You can even filter it for a time period.

Support

The Chart View and Widget

4 min read Feature   Need to better analyze the tasks or information within one or multiple boards? Want to see how well your team members are doing when completing their tasks or see the pro...

Hope this helps!

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hii @GiannisKoukounas ,

It doesn’t work on me, could you provide a guide for me?
My end goal is actually to visualise the success rate of my employees.

Regards,
Wang Khang Yao

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-01-26 at 11.35.14 AM1108×854 70.1 KB

Now that i am able to create this chart, is it possible to show the percentage of how much an employee is able to win?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, just go to the settings and change it to a chart!

image1328×765 40.3 KB

Then use the filters to see the % for each person.
